incidents.title: Netflix Billing Scam Email
incidents.raw_report: got an email saying my netflix was suspended click here to update payment. looked fake

incidents.title: Catalytic Converter Theft
incidents.raw_report: my neighbor had their catalytic converter stolen overnight on elm street. third one this week

incidents.title: Local Gym Data Breach
incidents.raw_report: FitLife gym sent email saying member data was exposed including names emails and partial credit cards

incidents.title: IRS Tax Season Robocall
incidents.raw_report: got a call saying irs will arrest me if i dont pay $500 in gift cards immediately. classic scam right?

incidents.title: Water Main Break — Oak Street
incidents.raw_report: massive water main break on oak and 5th. road closed. traffic backed up for blocks
action_checklist: Use alternate route via Main Blvd

incidents.title: Fake Windows Security Alert Popup
incidents.raw_report: my mom got a popup saying her computer was infected and to call microsoft support number. she almost called

incidents.title: Porch Piracy Surge
incidents.raw_report: someone stole amazon packages from 3 houses on my street today caught on ring camera

incidents.title: Rogue WiFi Hotspot at Coffee Shop
incidents.raw_report: saw a wifi network called 'BrewHouse_Free' at brewhouse cafe but the real one is 'BrewHouse_Guest'. classic evil twin attack
action_checklist: Always verify WiFi name with staff

incidents.title: Utility Impersonation Scam
incidents.raw_report: man knocked on door saying he was from PG&E needed to check meter or power would be cut. asked for cash to clear debt. fake!
action_checklist: Call utility company directly to verify
Do not let in without verification

incidents.title: Romance Scam Targeting Seniors
incidents.raw_report: my grandmother was almost scammed by someone on facebook claiming to be a military officer. asked for gift cards for flight home
action_checklist: Never send money to someone you haven't met
Report to FBI IC3 at ic3.gov

incidents.title: Downed Power Line
incidents.raw_report: Huge tree branch fell on power lines on 4th street during the storm. Sparks everywhere, power is out.

incidents.title: Crypto Investment Scam Group
incidents.raw_report: Was added to a WhatsApp group promising guaranteed returns on crypto. They ask for an initial deposit of $1k. Total scam.
action_checklist: Never send crypto to unverified addresses

incidents.title: Car Window Smash-and-Grab
incidents.raw_report: Left my backpack in the backseat for 10 mins. Came back to a smashed window near the local park.
action_checklist: Never leave bags visible in car
Park in secure or busy areas

incidents.title: Fake Delivery Notification SMS
incidents.raw_report: Received a text claiming USPS couldn't deliver my package and I need to pay a $2 redelivery fee via a sketchy link.

incidents.title: Local Pharmacy Cyberattack
incidents.raw_report: TownCare Pharmacy sent a letter saying patient records might have been accessed in a ransomware attack last month.

incidents.title: Gas Leak Suspected
incidents.raw_report: Strong smell of rotten eggs near the corner of 10th and Maple. PG&E trucks are arriving now.
action_checklist: Leave the area immediately if smell is strong
Do not use electronics or light matches

incidents.title: Bank Impersonation Text
incidents.raw_report: Got a text from 'Chase' saying my account is locked due to unusual activity. Link looks like chace-support.com instead of chase.
action_checklist: Login directly via the official bank app
Forward SMS to 7726 or report to bank

incidents.title: Fake Charity Door-to-Door
incidents.raw_report: Couple going door-to-door asking for cash donations for local school sports team. School confirmed they have no such drive.
action_checklist: Never give cash at the door
Report suspicious solicitors to non-emergency line

incidents.title: Unsecured Public Library Network
incidents.raw_report: The public library wifi is entirely unencrypted now. Anyone can intercept traffic if they are on the same network.
action_checklist: Use a VPN for all traffic

incidents.title: School District Portal Breach
incidents.raw_report: Local school district sent notices that the parent portal was breached. Student names and emergency contacts were accessed.
action_checklist: Be alert for targeted phishing emails

incidents.title: Mailbox Fishing in Apartment Complex
incidents.raw_report: Someone is using a string and sticky tape to pull mail out of the outgoing mail slot in our building lobby.
action_checklist: Drop outgoing mail directly at post office

incidents.title: Malicious PDF Attachment
incidents.raw_report: Receiving emails with subject 'Invoice Overdue' containing a PDF that tries to download an executable when opened.
action_checklist: Verify invoices with sender via phone

incidents.title: Tire Slashing Incident
incidents.raw_report: Three cars parked on 2nd Ave had their tires slashed overnight. Looks like vandalism rather than theft.
action_checklist: Park in secure garages if possible

incidents.title: Dating App Investment Scam
incidents.raw_report: Matched with someone on Tinder who immediately wanted to talk about crypto investments and move to WhatsApp.
action_checklist: Never take investment advice from dating app matches
Do not move conversation off-platform immediately
Report the profile to the app

incidents.title: Grandparent Bail Scam Call
incidents.raw_report: Grandfather got a call from someone claiming to be me needing bail money. They spoofed my area code.
action_checklist: Hang up and call the family member directly
Never wire money or send gift cards to strangers

incidents.title: Fake Job Offer Scam
incidents.raw_report: Got an unsolicited job offer on LinkedIn for data entry paying $50/hr. They want me to buy my own equipment from their 'approved vendor' with a fake check.
action_checklist: Legitimate employers don't ask you to pay for equipment upfront
Report the listing/message via the platform

incidents.title: Major Traffic Light Outage
incidents.raw_report: All traffic lights at the intersection of Market and 5th are completely out. Traffic is extremely dangerous.

incidents.title: Parking App Data Leak
incidents.raw_report: The EasyPark app sent an alert that passwords might have been compromised. They are forcing a reset.
action_checklist: Change password on any other site using the same credentials

incidents.title: License Plate Theft
incidents.raw_report: Noticed my rear license plate was swapped with another one. Probably used for toll evasion or worse.
action_checklist: Report stolen plate to DMV/police immediately

incidents.title: Hotel WiFi Intercept
incidents.raw_report: Connected to Grand Hotel WiFi and my browser warned about an invalid security certificate. Someone might be trying a man-in-the-middle attack.
action_checklist: Do not ignore browser certificate warnings
Use cellular data or a trusted VPN

incidents.title: Follow-Home Delivery Theft
incidents.raw_report: A car was following the FedEx truck and stealing packages right after they were dropped off on porches in my neighborhood.
action_checklist: Schedule deliveries for times you are present
Report suspicious vehicles following delivery trucks

incidents.title: Fake Antivirus Renewal
incidents.raw_report: Received an email saying my Norton subscription auto-renewed for $399. Called the number in the email and they wanted remote access to my PC to 'refund' me.
action_checklist: Never call numbers from unsolicited emails
Never give remote access to unexpected callers

incidents.title: Fake Parking Attendant
incidents.raw_report: Someone in a generic orange vest was charging $20 cash for parking at the public free lot near the stadium.
action_checklist: Never pay cash to uncredentialed individuals

incidents.title: Catfishing Extortion
incidents.raw_report: Friend met someone online, exchanged compromising photos, and now the person is demanding $5,000 or they'll send them to his family.
action_checklist: Do not pay the ransom - it never stops
Stop all communication and block the scammer

incidents.title: Sinkhole Developing
incidents.raw_report: There is a massive depression forming in the road on Pine between 7th and 8th. Asphalt is cracking badly around it.
action_checklist: Avoid driving or walking near the area

noise_filtered.raw: ugh my neighbor parks in front of my house AGAIN so annoying i hate living here
the city takes forever to fix potholes typical government incompetence!!!!!
anyone know a good plumber? my sink is leaking
noise_filtered.reason: Service request, not a safety incident

meta.note: All data is entirely fabricated for demonstration purposes. No real incidents or personal data.
